Refer to figure.
Using the content of ITEM 15 OTHER INFORMATION of the ATS Flight Plan (FPL) below, determine the cruising Flight Level (FL) when crossing the waypoint MOKOR.

N0358F240 TURON4S TURON A5 ASDEB/N0448F380 DCT LOTEE UN741 MOKOR UN873 OBATO/N0426F360 UN873 RONAX/N0408F340 UN873 VEKIN UZ173 ARVOL ARVOL6A
